scripts.crawl: cd apps/crawler && uv run python crawler.py
scripts.parse: cd apps/crawler && uv run python parser.py
scripts.index: cd apps/crawler && uv run python indexer.py
scripts.validate: cd apps/crawler && uv run python validate.py
scripts.build-books: cd apps/crawler && uv run python book_builder.py
scripts.lint: cd apps/crawler && uv run ruff check .
scripts.format: cd apps/crawler && uv run ruff format .
scripts.pipeline: cd apps/crawler && uv run python pipeline.py
scripts.dev: echo 'Reader not yet scaffolded — run after Epic 1'
scripts.build: echo 'Reader not yet scaffolded — run after Epic 1'
scripts.test: echo 'Run test:crawler for crawler tests or wait for Epic 1'
